comparisons.name: Curated bibliography vs ORCID work groups
comparisons.interpretation: The local bibliography intentionally includes presentations, courses, books, software-linked works, and local documentation. ORCID groups external works by identifier/version.

comparisons.name: Curated bibliography vs PubMed exact author records
comparisons.interpretation: PubMed only covers biomedical/indexed literature and is a strict subset of the curated bibliography.

comparisons.name: Curated bibliography vs Crossref ORCID DOI records
comparisons.interpretation: Crossref captures DOI records attached to the ORCID; Zenodo, books, courses, and non-DOI works may be absent or represented elsewhere.

comparisons.name: Curated bibliography vs Zenodo ORCID-linked records
comparisons.interpretation: Zenodo includes versioned records and software archives; the local bibliography normalizes selected works into one curated table.

comparisons.name: Catalogued docxology software vs GitHub public repository count
comparisons.interpretation: SOFTWARE.md intentionally catalogs selected owned repositories; GitHub counts all public repositories including forks and uncatalogued experiments.

comparisons.name: Catalogued AII contributions vs AII GitHub public repository count
comparisons.interpretation: SOFTWARE.md lists AII repositories with docxology contributions, not every public AII repository.
